ranked_assets.title: Cache and reuse file reads instead of re-reading
expected_benefits: ~30% fewer input tokens on long sessions
rationales: Agents re-read the same files and re-embed full file contents across LLM calls.

ranked_assets.title: Token efficiency and tool-call redundancy metric view
expected_benefits: Track redundancy rate and tokens-per-task to quantify avoidable spend and cost over time.
rationales: Repeated tool calls and re-read files inflate tokens; a governed metric view over the L0 tables would make the redundant tool-call rate and tokens-per-task visible per model.
Surface tool-call volume and estimated cost so regressions in token efficiency are caught early.

ranked_assets.title: Cache token churn dashboard metric
expected_benefits: Spot ephemeral cache re-creation churn driving avoidable input tokens.
rationales: Large cache_creation/cache_read churn across iterations indicates repeated re-ingestion of context.

ranked_assets.title: Instruct the agent to send diffs, not whole files
rationales: The agent re-embeds full file contents instead of concise diffs.

ranked_assets.title: A grep/summarize helper tool
expected_benefits: Avoid full-file reads when only a span is needed
rationales: Repeated full reads where a targeted search would do.

notes: 1 trace(s) recorded as review_failed (skipped, not a pass)
